query:
SELECT id, name, username FROM users WHERE name = '宥凱' OR username = '宥凱' LIMIT 5;
SELECT psd.userId, psd.businessDate, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS distinctEventCount, COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS duplicateCount
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE (u.name = '宥凱' OR u.username = '宥凱')
  AND psd.businessDate = CURRENT_DATE()
GROUP BY psd.userId, psd.businessDate;
SELECT p.batchNo, p.id AS productId, p.sheetRowNumber, p.lastSheetSyncedAt, p.poNumber, p.vendorName, p.importedCategoryName
FROM products p
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025253','00500025252','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
ORDER BY p.batchNo;

SELECT psd.userId, psd.businessDate, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS distinctEventCount, COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS duplicateCount
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE (u.name = '宥凱' OR u.username = '宥凱')
  AND psd.businessDate = CURRENT_DATE()
GROUP BY psd.userId, psd.businessDate;
SELECT p.batchNo, p.id AS productId, p.sheetRowNumber, p.lastSheetSyncedAt, p.poNumber, p.vendorName, p.importedCategoryName
FROM products p
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025253','00500025252','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
ORDER BY p.batchNo;
